description:

Short description: Soundwave find out that one of his onenight stands got sparkled and they left him with sparkling. And now when Decepticon's was "disbanded" on Earth, Soundwave was left alone with his mini cassections and you - his sparkling. Surprisingly, the blue con wasn't like your carrier, he cared about you and loved you even if he could express himself.
